hero.label: TRAINING PROGRAM
hero.title: Do Dream Together International Program
hero.subtitle: Overseas Christian Youth Invitation Medium/Long-term Stay Spiritual Training Program

identity.label: ABOUT THE PROGRAM
identity.purpose: An intensive training program designed to nurture next-generation church leaders by inviting overseas Christian youth for a deep, systematic spiritual training on the essence of the Christian faith.

items.title: Revival of the Next Generation
items.desc: Leading the spiritual awakening and faith restoration of the younger generation.

items.title: Spiritual Leadership for the Nations
items.desc: Training world-embracing vision and servant leadership.

items.title: Living the Essence of Faith
items.desc: Living out a life built on the Gospel of the Cross — not in theory, but in practice.

items.title: Life Together in Community
items.desc: Eating, praying, and learning together — experiencing unity in Christ.

subjects.title: Our Great Salvation
subjects.description: This is Book 1 of the Foundational Bible Study Series. Through exploring the nature of salvation, the character of sin, the elements of faith, and what it means to know God intellectually, spiritually, and morally, you will discover concretely how to learn from God and how to pray. If you attend church faithfully but feel you lack assurance in your faith, this is a highly recommended course.

subjects.title: The Gospel of the Cross
subjects.description: This is Book 1 of the Core Bible Study Series. Topics include intimate fellowship with God, a God-centered life, the nature of legalism and its fruits, spiritual discernment, and the true meaning of knowing God. This series guides you back to the essence of faith through the Gospel of the Cross, which is at the very heart of the Christian life.

subjects.title: Missional Church — The Comprehensive Nature of Redemption
subjects.description: This series examines the historical reality of the Resurrection, the Lordship of Christ, and the overarching nature of redemption through the biblical narrative. Through the integration of the Cultural Mandate and the Great Commission, you will learn why the church must be a missional community and understand the calling of Christians sent into the world.

subjects.title: Spiritual Leadership
subjects.description: This series trains servant leadership for the Kingdom of God. Through practical study of spiritual growth, team ministry, cross-cultural communication, and the principles of raising up the next generation, participants discover and develop their individual gifts and callings.

dayInProgram.label: A DAY IN THE PROGRAM
dayInProgram.title: Experience the Daily Rhythm

blocks.title: Morning Devotion & Breakfast
blocks.desc: Start the day with English Bible QT and personal reflection, then prepare for lectures after breakfast.

blocks.title: Core Lectures (4 Sessions)
blocks.desc: Intensive study of the core curriculum: Gospel of the Cross, Salvation, Missional Church, and Spiritual Leadership.

blocks.title: Korean Language & Culture
blocks.desc: Learn practical Korean conversation and grammar, then explore local areas and connect with mentors.

blocks.title: Evening & Worship
blocks.desc: After dinner, join the Isaiah 62 worship service and wind down with personal time.

dayInProgram.weekend_note: * Weekends include church services, cultural activities, and free time for rest and exploration.

phases.title: Foundation
phases.desc: Build assurance of salvation and the basics of prayer. Settle into community and begin fellowship with God.

phases.title: Deepening
phases.desc: Go deeper into the Gospel of the Cross. Begin living out the essence of faith within the community.

phases.title: Leadership
phases.desc: Study Missional Church and Spiritual Leadership. Discover your gifts and prepare to be sent out.

cta.label: JOIN US
cta.title: Ready to Apply?
cta.subtitle: Join us for an unforgettable journey of growth, learning, and transformation.

klife.label: K-LIFE CULTURAL PROGRAM
klife.title: Experience Korean Culture Firsthand
klife.subtitle: Curriculum-based monthly cultural excursions featuring short and long-distance trips to explore Korea's history, culture, and nature.

trips.location: Gyeongbokgung Palace → Bukchon Hanok Village → N Tower
National Museum of Korea → Nodeul Island (Han River)
Local Volunteering → Visiting Local Market → Suwon Sports Game (Evening)

spots.name: National Museum of Korean Contemporary History
